records.question: Who are the players on 2010-08-30 with stamina exactly 70, potential exactly 86, finishing at most 13, aggression at least 76, and attacking work rate medium?

SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.finishing <= 13.0 AND player_attributes.stamina = 70.0 AND player_attributes.aggression >= 76.0 AND player_attributes.date = '2010-08-30 00:00:00' AND player_attributes.potential = 86.0 AND player_attributes.attacking_work_rate = 'medium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.date = '2010-08-30'
AND pa.stamina = 70
AND pa.potential = 86
AND pa.finishing <= 13
AND pa.aggression >= 76
AND pa.attacking_work_rate = 'medium'

records.question: Which players named Elinton Andrade are at least 190 pounds, no less than 190.5 cm tall, and were born on or before March 30, 1979?

records.question: Which players have an agility of exactly 70.0, preferred foot is right, gk_diving is exactly 5.0, marking is at least 24.0, vision is exactly 64.0, and attributes dated on or before 2012-08-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.agility = 70.0 AND player_attributes.preferred_foot = 'right' AND player_attributes.gk_diving = 5.0 AND player_attributes.marking >= 24.0 AND player_attributes.date <= '2012-08-31 00:00:00' AND player_attributes.vision = 64.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.agility = 70
AND pa.preferred_foot = 'right'
AND pa.gk_diving = 5
AND pa.marking >= 24
AND pa.vision = 64
AND pa.date <= '2012-08-31'

SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.standing_tackle <= 59.0 AND player_attributes.gk_positioning <= 21.0 AND player_attributes.shot_power >= 85.0 AND player_attributes.strength = 89.0

SELECT DISTINCT p.id
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.strength = 89

  AND pa.standing_tackle <= 59
  AND pa.gk_positioning <= 21
